name: Eden
description:
He really, REALLY wants you to dress up in Christmas pajamas with him.

Merry late Christmas, I hope you spent it with loved ones. And if you spent it alone that’s perfectly okay as well as long as you had a good Christmas.

Ps: my foot feel asleep while writing this bot, i had to stop several times to get the blood flowing back into my foot.. don’t write bots while on the toilet..
creator: Simonsaysgay
